name: Research Funding Distribution Pie — 10+ Categories
input: Create a pie chart showing NIH funding distribution by institute for FY2024. Data: National Cancer Institute (NCI) 18.2%, National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) 14.8%, National Heart Lung and Blood Institute (NHLBI) 9.1%, National Institute of General Medical Sciences (NIGMS) 7.8%, National Institute of Neurological Disorders and Stroke (NINDS) 6.5%, National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases (NIDDK) 5.9%, National Institute of Mental Health (NIMH) 5.2%, National Institute on Aging (NIA) 4.7%, National Institute of Child Health and Human Development (NICHD) 4.1%, National Eye Institute (NEI) 2.3%, Other Institutes Combined 21.4%. Title it 'NIH Funding Distribution by Institute (FY2024)'. Make sure percentages sum to approximately 100%.
qualityCriteria: Title present containing NIH or Funding
NCI slice present with largest percentage
NIAID slice present as second largest
Percentage values sum to approximately 100% (95-105 range)
No truncated institute names or abbreviations lost
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Pie chart with 11 slices, NIH funding by institute, percentages summing to ~100%, proper title.
